sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for this game

special_mechanics.name: Diver Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a diver in side-view underwater encounters with various sea creatures. Movement mechanics not precisely documented.

special_mechanics.name: Submarine Variant
special_mechanics.description: Alternative controllable unit with two weapons (torpedoes and depth charges) and less inertia than the diver. One collision destroys it and releases diver.

special_mechanics.name: Boat Dynamics
special_mechanics.description: Overhead map view with boat piloting. Encounters trigger side-view perspective shifts.

special_mechanics.name: Crab Pickup
special_mechanics.description: Collectible item that increases movement speed of the diver.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details are documented in available sources. Sources provide gameplay mechanics and objective descriptions but not quantified physics values. Game involves both overhead map navigation and side-view combat encounters with different movement characteristics not numerically specified.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (TCRF) - Jaws NES article
